protocol.name: virtual_keyboard_unstable_v1

interface.name: zwp_virtual_keyboard_v1
interface.description: The virtual keyboard provides an application with requests which emulate the behaviour of a physical keyboard.

interface.name: zwp_virtual_keyboard_manager_v1
interface.description: A virtual keyboard manager allows an application to provide keyboard input events as if they came from a physical keyboard.
